title: Type Operators, Mapped Types, Conditional Types, and Templates · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: Derive form, event, and patch contracts from one domain model without duplicating names or accepting impossible states. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a derived contract and event-type library and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defe…
objectives: Use type-context typeof to derive from runtime declarations without confusing it with runtime typeof.
Map over property keys with modifiers, key remapping, and value transforms while preserving intended optionality.
Use distributive and non-distributive conditional types with explicit true and false branch meaning.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Inspect the failure record
steps.instruction:
debug case — Derive public patch, readonly view, and event-name types from a service model with id, status, and retryCount. A newly added region field must flow through the intended transform without exposing internal secret fields. Competency probe: Use type-context typeof to derive from runtime declarations without confusing it with runtime typeof.
